diagnosis: Joint 1 bearing showing thermal stress — temperature exceeded critical threshold during production cycle.
recommended_action: Inspect Joint 1 bearing immediately. Check lubrication. Limit operation to 70% speed until inspection complete.

supporting_evidence.description: Joint 1 temperature reached 96.2°C, exceeding critical threshold of 100°C
E_JOINT_TEMP_CRITICAL event recorded during afternoon shift
Cycle time degraded 9% — consistent with joint resistance increase

diagnosis: Critical joint bearing failure — machine halted by emergency thermal safety system.
recommended_action: DO NOT restart. Replace Joint 1 bearing immediately. Full robot inspection required before returning to service.

supporting_evidence.description: Joint 1 temperature at 104.7°C — 4.7°C above critical threshold
E_JOINT_TEMP_CRITICAL triggered 3 times in past 2 hours
Emergency stop activated by thermal safety system
Servo current at 8.9A — 99% of critical limit

recommended_action: Shut down machine immediately. Inspect cooling system, lubrication, and ventilation. Do not restart until temperature returns to normal range.
